untranslatable_reason: The signal requires the 'open-buy put-call ratio' derived from CBOE option trading volume data. This is an options market indicator not available in the allowed price/technical indicator set. The allowed indicators contain only equity price/volume data (OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, z-scores, and bar properties). Options market data is not supported. As a proxy, vol_ratio_20 was used as a high-volume condition, but this does not capture the put-call ratio logic.
translation_notes: Signal references CBOE open-buy put-call ratio which measures option market sentiment. This metric cannot be constructed from the allowed indicators. The 1-day holding period and reversal logic (short when ratio elevated, exit next day) have been preserved in the structure, but the core entry signal is untranslatable without options market data.
